arts.ttl: Bournemouth fume at VAR controversy in Man Utd draw - 'It doesn't make sense'
arts.sum: Bournemouth were left to play with 10 men for 26 minutes against Manchester United after Evanilson was sent off for a foul on Noussair Mazraoui, despite appearing to slip

arts.ttl: Andoni Iraola slams Evanilson red card decision as Bournemouth boss reveals appeal stance following Man United draw
arts.sum: Bournemouth head coach Andoni Iraola criticises the decision to send off Evanilson in Sunday's 1-1 draw with Manchester United.

arts.ttl: ‘Tough’: Antoine Semenyo makes comment about Arsenal immediately after scoring against Man United
arts.sum: Arsenal have sporadically been linked with a move for Bournemouth winger Antonine Semenyo this summer. Since Andrea Berta’s arrival in north London, Arsenal are thought...

arts.ttl: Bournemouth fume over red card decision as Man Utd snatch late point
arts.sum: Bournemouth were left fuming over Evanilson’s red card after Manchester United denied them victory at Dean Court on Sunday. The Cherries were leading thanks to a 23rd-minute goal from Antoine Semenyo when the Brazilian striker was sent off for going through the back of Noussair Mazraoui midway through the second half. Rasmus Hojlund found an […] The post Bournemouth fume over red card decision as Man Utd snatch late point first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Man Utd leave it late as Rasmus Hojlund denies 10-man Bournemouth
arts.sum: Antoine Semenyo’s goal looked set to secure victory for the Cherries until Evanilson’s dismissal.
